phases.label: Rules + skills + template

phases.label: Cross-dependency (35a merge + payload)
phases.duration_note: Includes Jira key parse, Phoenix tree search for merge key, reuse/validate JSON
phases.measured_samples_source: PowerShell Stopwatch on Windows workstation; Phoenix tree has long-path errors on some files — timing is indicative only

recommendations_for_agent_wrapper: Wrap each phase id in Stopwatch.StartNew/Stop from host orchestrator
Append one JSON line per run to this jsonl (same schema version)
Parallelize p3_jira + p2 merge grep after key known; never parallelize before cross_dependency_data is complete
Cache cross_dependencies file by jira_key + git rev-parse HEAD for skip-rediscovery
